title: KINGLAKE 6.4cm 10m Sage Green Wired Ribbon for Wreath Bows Making, Wide Christmas Wired Ribbon for Crafting, Gift Wrapping, Xmas, Rustic Wedding Decoration
features: [Wired Ribbon] - The wire ribbon roll come with metal wired edge, easy to shape, making the bow more three-dimensional, well cut and has good sewing edge, not easy to tear or fade, can be use for a long time.

[Rustic Gift Ribbon] - Classic natural colors are always in style. Vintage sage green ribbon is suitable for decorating most items and many occasions, perfect for gift wrapping and DIY crafting to create a rustic yet chic look, sure to make your gifts and projects more attractive and impressive.

[Package List] - Width: 6 cm/ 2.5 inch; length: 10 m; you can choose different sizes as needs and cut into any length. This hessian ribbon is seamlessly rolled for neat lines and symmetrical stitching. It comes in roll, fixed with a pin, easier to use and store.

[Craft Ribbon] - The jute ribbon is perfect for crafting and bows making,decorating bottles/jars/vases/boxes/baskets/cakes/candles, using as florist ribbon, matching autumn wreath, or adding a rustic look to your gift cards or wedding invitations.

[Wired Christmas Ribbon] - The sage green ribbon is ideal for Christmas gift wrapping, pretty Christmas wreath wired ribbon or xmas tree wire ribbon, also is great decorative ribbon for Christmas, Halloween, weddings, birthday parties, Easter, Valentine's Day, mothers day, anniversaries, graduations, New Years,party and more.
